severityModel.P1: High-risk defect requiring closure before confident controlled launch
severityModel.P2: Material engineering, maintainability, accessibility or governance debt

principles: Every Git-tracked file must be inventoried.
Every eligible text line must be processed by deterministic rules.
Scanner output is evidence input, not a substitute for human domain review.
P0 and P1 findings require a fix or an explicit release-blocking issue.
Exceptions must be narrow, owned, issue-linked and expiring.
README and product documentation must describe verified reality rather than aspiration.
